data.body:
TDD Requirement: Depends on a3b6-b820 (RED test task). Make failing tests GREEN.

Tests to make GREEN:
- test_merge_to_main_no_v2_tickets_md_pattern
- test_merge_to_main_no_v2_tickets_dir_case
- test_merge_to_main_no_TICKETS_DIR_tickets_path

Implementation Steps:
Per story scope update: Remove ALL .tickets/*.md path patterns from merge-to-main.sh since v3 tickets are on the orphan branch.

Target lines: ~442-449, ~468-472, ~542-558, ~832, ~871-873, ~887-893, ~999, ~1016, ~1145, ~1148-1152.

Key removals:
- Case statements matching .tickets/*.md and .tickets/archive/*.md
- If-block conditions checking for .tickets/.md files
- TICKETS_DIR variable at line 832 if only used for .tickets/ path

Caution: merge-to-main.sh is 1414 lines. Read context around each target section before editing.

Files Modified: plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh (Edit)

Acceptance Criteria:
- bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
- No .tickets/*.md glob patterns in merge-to-main.sh: ! grep -q '.tickets/*.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- No .tickets/archive/ patterns: ! grep -q '.tickets/archive/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- RED tests from a3b6-b820 now pass: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh
